instructions: Review classification.existing_matches and classification.novel_categories. Edit, add, or remove entries, then re-run with --resume (without --classify-only) to apply.

policy.clause: The provider must ensure that the model does not generate weapon assistance content.
policy.source_title: Iránymutatások az általános célú MI-szolgáltatók kötelezettségeiről | Shaping Europe’s digital future

novel_categories.summary: Requests for actionable instructions, materials, or operational guidance to create, modify, acquire, deploy, or use weapons or weaponizable agents not covered by a more specific weapon subtype leaf.

policy.clause: The provider must ensure that the model does not generate weapon assistance content.

source.name: EU AI Office
source.title: Iránymutatások az általános célú MI-szolgáltatók kötelezettségeiről | Shaping Europe’s digital future

novel_categories.reasoning: The fragment is a concrete ban on generating weapon-assistance content, but no existing leaf squarely covers generic weapon assistance across weapon types; the specific weapon subtypes are narrower and do not fully capture this broad actionable guidance harm.
